name: io.github.portofcams/aina-atlas
description: MCP server exposing Āina Atlas — Hawaii parcel lookup (TMK, zoning, lava/tsunami/FEMA hazards, ahupuaʻa context, ADU, AVM) plus an AI property brief — as Claude tools.

environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key — only needed for the generate_property_brief tool. The parcel-lookup tools work without it.
environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Base URL for the Aina Atlas data API. Defaults to https://addressapi.portofcams.com.
environmentVariables.name: AINA_BASE_URL
